channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: US strikes bridges and collapses a tower at a key port as its Iran campaign expands - The Washington Post
Asian shares sink, with Tokyo down more than 5% as slumping AI stocks drag world markets lower - The Washington Post
